changes.comment: Inject a one-shot <group_bots> context of a group's trusted bots on the first delivered message after /introduce (commit-after-notify, generation-safe clear); add a model-facing list_chat_bots MCP tool (backed by a read-only mcp.list_chat_bots admin method) returning a chat's known + trusted bots; and change the inbound reaction lifecycle to add-then-cancel so the message never shows a zero-reaction window during the received -> in-progress transition.
